overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in a leather jacket and cowboy hat walking through a rainy night in an 1890s frontier town. The character transitions from covered wooden boardwalks along muddy streets into narrow back alleys and finally into a sheltered interior courtyard and corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden boardwalk with historic storefronts

events.description: horse and rider pass by on the left side of the muddy street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered wooden boardwalk, passing by storefronts and street lamps

notable_agents.action: man in blue coat standing with arms crossed near the hotel entrance
horse with rider trotting past on the muddy street

entered.detail: wooden awning covering the sidewalk with visible support beams and corrugated metal
painted sign reading HOTEL CHEVALIER on the building facade
vertical wooden posts supporting the covered walkway roof
cast iron lamp post with warm yellow glowing light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered wooden boardwalk on a rainy night, sheltered from the downpour. Warm gas lamps illuminate the historic storefronts including the Hotel Chevalier, while a horse and rider pass by on the muddy street to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open muddy street with construction scaffolding

events.description: exits covered boardwalk into open street exposed to heavy rain
rain becomes visibly heavier, creating strong reflections on the muddy ground surface

agents.ego_description: continuing down the muddy street past wooden scaffolding and a large illuminated street clock

entered.detail: temporary wooden support structure and planks against the building facade
tall pole with large circular illuminated clock face
wooden A-frame barriers blocking part of the street

segments.scene_description: Leaving the shelter of the boardwalk, the character enters the open muddy street where heavy rain falls freely. A large street clock stands on the left while wooden scaffolding lines the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with brick walls and golden cat sign

events.description: turns into narrow alleyway marked by golden cat statue overhead
passes directly under the golden cat sign structure overhead

agents.ego_description: entering the narrow alleyway, walking between tall brick walls with rain falling

entered.detail: gilded cat statue mounted on wooden beam above the alley entrance
tall red brick walls enclosing the narrow passage on both sides
stacked wooden barrels and crates along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow brick alleyway marked by a distinctive golden cat statue overhead. Rain continues to fall in the enclosed space as wooden barrels line the walls and the passage narrows significantly.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard with staircases and corridor

events.description: enters interior courtyard through arched doorway, leaving the rain behind
enters darker corridor with warm wall-mounted lanterns replacing the cooler outdoor light

agents.ego_description: walking through the arched doorway into the sheltered courtyard, then proceeding into a dimly lit interior corridor with stairs on both sides

entered.detail: arched stone doorway marking the transition from alley to interior space
sheltered open area with wooden staircases on left and right leading to upper floors
wooden stairs with railings and potted plants at the base
warm glowing lantern-style lights mounted on the brick walls
rotating ceiling fan visible in the interior corridor

segments.scene_description: Passing through a stone archway, the character enters a sheltered interior courtyard protected from the rain. The space features wooden staircases on both sides and potted plants, before transitioning into a darker corridor illuminated by warm wall sconces and a ceiling fan.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered town boardwalk through a rain-drenched street and into a secluded interior courtyard. It begins under the cover of a wooden boardwalk where warm gas lamps illuminate storefronts like the Hotel Chevalier as a rider passes on the muddy street. As the character leaves the shelter, the scene opens into the heavy downpour of the main street, passing a large street clock and wooden scaffolding. The camera then follows the character into a narrow brick alleyway beneath a golden cat statue, moving past wooden barrels as the space tightens. Finally, the path leads through a stone archway into a dry interior courtyard with wooden staircases and potted plants, before shifting into a dark corridor lit by warm wall sconces and a ceiling fan.
